params.SpellDescription: Gain control of target noncreature spell. You may choose new targets for it. (If that spell is an artifact, enchantment, or planeswalker, the permanent you control enters.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Gain control of target noncreature spell. You may choose new targets for it. (If that spell is an artifact, enchantment, or planeswalker, the permanent you control enters.)

params.Description: You may exile two blue cards from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
